events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: commercial project, baseplates & anchor bolts, observed condition is insufficient anchor bolt projection. Reference: API RP 686 (API Recommended Practice 686, Machinery Installation). Anchor bolt projection insufficient means the bolts don't project enough above the concrete/grout to allow full engagement of nuts and washers on the baseplate. This is non-compliant. Work is rough-complete. Decision: fail. Risk: medium-high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 70. Value: not a numeric reading asked. Confidence high.
